title: Operation Engineer
company: WCA Walldorf Consulting GmbH Latvijas filiāle

summary.lv: Operation Engineer IT drošības un identitātes pārvaldības jomā (IAM), kas atbalsta klientu kompleksās IAM vides un risina 2./3. līmeņa atbalsta pieprasījumus.
summary.en: Operation Engineer in Identity & Access Management and IT security, supporting complex customer IAM environments and handling 2nd/3rd level support requests.
